Why B2K

We Don't Do Generic Tours

Small groups, big experience

Max 8 riders per tour. You're part of a crew that shares every mile.

Safety without compromise

Premium bikes, full gear, support vehicle, guide on every road.

7 years, 1,000+ riders

Since 2018 perfecting these routes. Our repeat rider rate speaks for itself.

Over 1,000 riders have crossed Indonesia with us. These are their moments.
